rule_metadata.name: xxd
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'xxd' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule xxd
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'xxd' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "xxd"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /xxd\s\-p\s\-c\s4\s\/.{0,1000}\s\|\swhile\sread\sline.{0,1000}\sdo\sping\s\-c\s1\s\-p\s/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
